selected_dialects.reason: The base cube (100x100x100mm) is a rectangular prismatic block best created via sketch_extrude. Holes on faces can be expressed as cut_hole operations on the appropriate faces.
Multiple independent hole features on different faces require boolean cut operations across different orientations, which composition dialect handles via boolean_cut and translate/rotate operations.

safety_notes: Reference geometry only. Not manufacturing-ready or certified.
Hole positions on different faces require careful coordinate transforms.
